text.title: Chunking Strategies — Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from input brief to signed-off output config.

list.item: Action: List doc types with counts + structure notes.
Decision gate: If <2 types, skip the dispatcher; pick a single strategy.
Action: For each type pick 2-3 candidate strategies.
Decision gate: If a strategy isn't supported by your chunker library, skip or implement.
Action: Run retrieval eval at top-k=5; compare recall.
Decision gate: If recall variance < 2pp, pick the simpler strategy.
Decision gate: If dispatcher logic is complex, encapsulate as a class.
Action: Re-ingest, re-embed, benchmark recall vs previous baseline.
Decision gate: If recall drops, revert and investigate; do not ship regression.
